item.title: 0.4.6 beta (build 28)
item.description:
Groovyday 0.4.6 private beta

  • Scene Opacity and Top-edge Fade controls now tune both Dock Wings and Dockscape live
  • Dock Wings now dissolve smoothly into the wallpaper instead of ending at a hard upper edge
  • Dock accessory backgrounds, outlines, control trays, and button circles no longer cover the visualizer

This is an opt-in development build for personal testing.
